title: Nursery Rhyme. DXIX. Natural History.
content:
A pie sate on a pear-tree,
        A pie sate on a pear-tree,
        A pie sate on a pear-tree,
        Heigh O, heigh O, heigh O!
        Once so merrily hopp'd she,
        Twice so merrily hopp'd she,
        Thrice so merrily hopp'd she,
        Heigh O, heigh O, heigh O!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. DXIX. Natural History."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
